summary: First-finish smoke test of Adhish Kacker portfolio. Backend (FastAPI) and frontend (React) both healthy. All 12 review-requested checks pass except two minor test-script-related observations.
passed: POST /api/contact valid payload returns 200 with id + persisted in Mongo
POST /api/contact invalid email returns 422 validation error
GET /api/contact returns array of submissions (descending order)
Page title = 'Adhish Kacker — Senior Product Marketing & GTM Leader'
Hero section visible with headline 'Turning Products Into Market Leaders'
Nav link 'About' smooth-scrolls to about section
Theme toggle flips html.dark class on/off (visual works)
Hero CTA 'View My Work' scrolls to work section
Hero CTA 'Download Resume' click invoked (scroll executed)
Case Studies: 5 case-trigger-* found; clicking expands and reveals case-download-* button
Articles: exactly 13 article-card-* anchors, all with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer', valid external URLs
Testimonials next/prev buttons clickable and cycle without error
Contact form submits successfully end-to-end: toast 'Message sent — Adhish will get back to you shortly.' shown; form fields cleared; record persisted via API
Footer has 5 footer-link-* internal scroll buttons
Mobile (390x800): nav-mobile-toggle opens menu with all 7 nav links visible (verified via screenshot)
No console/page JS errors observed during full flow

failed.issue: Could not locate theme value in localStorage under common keys (theme/portfolio-theme/adhish-theme). Toggle visual works; persistence across reload not conclusively verified.
failed.evidence: localStorage.getItem returned null for tried keys

action_items: Optional: confirm the localStorage key name used for theme persistence and verify it survives a full page reload.
